The '''''Grey Wolf''''' was an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] best known as being the temporary [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of then-[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] during [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]]'s attempted coup against [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] approximately [[3 ABY/Legends|one year before]] the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==History==
This [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] was specifically used during the punitive campaign against [[Ali Tarrak]] and the [[Nami]] in response to their theft of the [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE/D Defender]] technology. Under the guidance of Thrawn, and with the assistance of ace pilot [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], the ''Grey Wolf'' successfully destroyed three [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruisers]] and two Rebel [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruisers]]—the ''[[Lonsigar 1]]'' and ''[[Lonsigar 2]]''—in addition to their substantial [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] attachments.

The ''Grey Wolf'' was also responsible for deploying the [[Missile Boat]] piloted by Stele that succeeded in destroying the Nami starfighter factory. Thrawn would later utilize the Star Destroyer during his efforts at hunting down Zaarin and eventually destroying the rogue officer's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the Star Destroyer [[Glory (Imperial-class)|''Glory'']].

Throughout the campaign, the ''Grey Wolf'' was commonly deployed with the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] [[Corvus (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Corvus'']] and the ''Strike''-class cruisers ''[[Ebolo]]'' and [[Daring (Strike-class)|''Daring'']].
